parent_email.description: Email of the parent this conversation is with

parent_name.description: Parent's display name, denormalized for the admin inbox

subject.description: Short subject line for the conversation

status.description: Whether the conversation is still active

last_message_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent message

last_message_preview.description: Short preview of the most recent message

unread_by_admin.description: True when the parent's latest message hasn't been read by the studio

unread_by_parent.description: True when the studio's latest reply hasn't been read by the parent
